business_description.nature_of_business: Hospitality operations including hotel employees, bellhops/doorpersons, restaurant operations, and clerical office employees

coverages_discussed.notes: Texas Department of Insurance experience rating worksheet for policy WC-HCHP-2025-3350; final experience modification factor 0.94

positives: Final experience modification factor is 0.94, indicating better than expected loss experience
Loss activity appears to consist entirely of primary losses with relatively modest incurred amounts by policy year
concerns: Claims were reported in each of the three experience years
Hospitality and restaurant operations can present ongoing workers compensation exposure
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Actual loss data shows 2 claims in 2023-2024 with total incurred 9940, 6 claims in 2022-2023 with total incurred 26662, and 8 claims in 2021-2022 with total incurred 56343. Total actual primary losses are 92945 and actual excess losses are 0.

extracted_text_sections.executive_summary: Texas Department of Insurance Experience Rating Worksheet for Hill Country Hospitality Partners, LLC. Policy Number: WC-HCHP-2025-3350. Policy Period: 2025-05-01 to 2026-05-01. Valuation Date: 2026-03-15. Final Experience Modification Factor: 0.94.
extracted_text_sections.operations_description: PAYROLL / CLASSIFICATION DATA: TX 9052 Hotel — All Other Employees; TX 9060 Hotel — Bellhops, Doorpersons; TX 9082 Restaurant — NOC; TX 8810 Clerical Office Employees — NOC.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: ACTUAL LOSS DATA: 2023-2024: 2 claims, total paid 9940, total incurred 9940, primary losses 9940, excess losses 0. 2022-2023: 6 claims, total paid 26662, total incurred 26662, primary losses 26662, excess losses 0. 2021-2022: 8 claims, total paid 56343, total incurred 56343, primary losses 56343, excess losses 0.
